mapper.sql: id, route_code, route_name, route_type, admin_grade, technical_grade, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, adcode, manage_org_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json, remark, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM road_route WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM road_route WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = false
SELECT FROM road_route WHERE AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_route(id, tenant_id, route_code, route_name, route_type, admin_grade, technical_grade, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, adcode, manage_org_id, geom, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{routeCode}, #{routeName}, #{routeType}, #{adminGrade}, #{technicalGrade}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{lengthKm}, #{adcode}, #{manageOrgId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE road_route SET route_code=#{routeCode}, route_name=#{routeName}, route_type=#{routeType}, admin_grade=#{adminGrade}, technical_grade=#{technicalGrade}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, length_km=#{lengthKm}, adcode=#{adcode}, manage_org_id=#{manageOrgId}, remark=#{remark}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
